deep_dive.title: SeFi-Image: A Text-to-Image Foundation Model with Semantic-First Diffusion
deep_dive.abstract: Training image generation foundation models consumes substantial resources. Previous methods have attempted to leverage semantic guidance to accelerate the training process, yet their experiments were only conducted on simple datasets such as ImageNet, at low resolutions, and with small-scale models. In this paper, we propose SeFi-Image, a text-to-image foundation model built upon semantic-first diffusion, a novel latent diffusion modeling paradigm. We instantiate SeFi-Image at three model scales, 1B, 2B, and 5B parameters, enabling systematic study of scaling behavior and flexible deployment under varying compute budgets. Notably, our largest 5B model was trained with merely 125K A800 GPU hours, corresponding to roughly 10-20% of the training compute used by Z-Image. However, it achieves results comparable to or even superior to Qwen-Image and Z-Image. Despite this modest training compute, SeFi-Image achieves strong performance on a wide range of benchmarks, including GenEval, DPG, LongTextBench, OneIG, and CVTG-2K. Moreover, we provide DMD2-distilled few-step turbo variants for each model scale to accommodate diverse hardware constraints and latency requirements. We publicly release our code, weights and hope this work offers the community useful insights into semantic-guided diffusion modeling for T2I generation, while also providing practical and readily deployable model options.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: text-to-image foundation model built upon semantic-first diffusion
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于语义优先扩散的文本到图像基础模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于语义优先扩散的文本到图像基础模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于语义优先扩散的文本到图像基础模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes SeFi-Image, a text-to-image foundation model using semantic-first diffusion, trained efficiently with only 125K A800 GPU hours for the 5B model.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 提出语义优先扩散文本到图像基础模型SeFi-Image，在1B、2B、5B三种规模下训练，最大5B模型仅用125K A800 GPU小时，约为常规开销的10-20%，显著降低了计算成本，为资源受限下的图像生成提供了新范式。

deep_dive.title: ELDiff: When Evidential Learning Meets Text-to-Image Diffusion
deep_dive.abstract: In multi-object text-to-image (T2I) diffusion, ensuring semantic consistency between textual prompts and generated visual content is crucial for image synthesis. However, such consistency constraint is often underemphasized in the denoising process of diffusion models. Although token supervised diffusion models can mitigate this issue by learning object-wise consistency between the image content and object segmentation maps, it tends to suffer from the problems of segmentation map bias and semantic overlap conflict, especially when involving multiple objects. In this paper, we propose ELDiff, a new evidential learning-supervised T2I diffusion model, which leverages the advantages of uncertainty metric and conflict detection to enhance the fault tolerance of unreliable segmentation maps and suppress semantic conflicts, strengthening object-wise consistency learning. Specifically, a pixel evidence loss is proposed to restrain overconfidence in unreliable labels through evidential regularization, and a token conflict loss is designed to weaken the contradiction between semantics through optimizing a measured conflict factor. Extensive experiments show that our ELDiff outperforms existing training based and train-free based T2I diffusion models on SD v1.4, SD v2.1, SDXL, SD v3.5, and Qwen-Image, without requiring additional inference-time manipulations. Notably, ELDiff can be seamlessly extended to the existing training pipeline of T2I diffusion models. Code can be found at https://github.com/QingtaoPan/ELDiff.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: proposes a new evidential learning-supervised T2I diffusion model
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出证据学习监督的文本到图像扩散模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出证据学习监督的文本到图像扩散模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出证据学习监督的文本到图像扩散模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: ELDiff introduces evidential learning to T2I diffusion to improve multi-object semantic consistency via uncertainty and conflict detection.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多对象文本到图像扩散模型中语义一致性不足的问题，提出ELDiff，将证据学习引入去噪过程，利用不确定性度量和冲突检测增强模型的容错能力和语义对齐。实验表明该方法有效提升了多对象生成的语义一致性，为可控图像合成提供了新思路。ELDiff通过同时建模不确定性和冲突信息，缓解了传统分割监督方法中的偏差问题，在多个基准上验证了其有效性，对扩散模型的可控生成具有参考价值。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对多对象文本到图像扩散模型中语义一致性不足的问题，提出ELDiff，将证据学习引入去噪过程，利用不确定性度量和冲突检测增强模型的容错能力和语义对齐。实验表明该方法有效提升了多对象生成的语义一致性，为可控图像合成提供了新思路。ELDiff通过同时建模不确定性和冲突信息，缓解了传统分割监督方法中的偏差问题，在多个基准上验证了其有效性，对扩散模型的可控生成具有参考价值。

deep_dive.title: Interest Entanglement: The Hidden Barrier to Blind Super-Resolution Optimization
deep_dive.abstract: Fidelity and perceptual quality are two inherently competing and conflicting objectives in the image super-resolution (SR) task. Different loss functions focus on these objectives to varying extents. Regression losses enhance the model's fidelity but lack sufficient attention to high-frequency details, resulting in a loss of fine details. In contrast, perception losses improve the model's visual quality but may introduce undesirable artifacts. Balancing these two optimization goals can be viewed as a Multi-Objective Optimization problem. Existing methods are limited to cautiously adjusting weight parameters between these losses, overlooking the underlying Interest Entanglement problem. To address this problem, we explore the inherent frequency-domain conflict between the regression objective and the perceptual objective, and analyze the causes of Interest Entanglement in SR tasks. According to our findings, we propose the Shared-Feature-Representation based Super-Resolution framework (SFR), which decouples the learning process of different optimization objectives, allowing the model to explore a common optimization direction for both goals and achieve an effective balance between them. To better leverage shared features, we also proposed the InfoSqueeze module, which filters redundant information through a dimensionality reduction and expansion process, effectively transforming features into a consistent space. Quantitative and qualitative experiments across five representative datasets affirm the superiority of SFR.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: addresses multi-objective optimization for balancing fidelity and perceptual quality in blind super-resolution
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 解决盲超分辨率中保真度与感知质量平衡的多目标优化问题
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 解决盲超分辨率中保真度与感知质量平衡的多目标优化问题
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 解决盲超分辨率中保真度与感知质量平衡的多目标优化问题
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper identifies the Interest Entanglement problem in blind super-resolution optimization and proposes a frequency-based approach to balance fidelity and perceptual quality.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文发现盲超分辨率优化中存在保真度与感知质量的利益纠缠问题，传统权重调整方法难以有效解决。通过探索频率域的固有特性，提出新的多目标优化策略，在提升细节的同时减少伪影。该研究为超分辨率模型的损失函数设计提供了理论指导。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文发现盲超分辨率优化中存在保真度与感知质量的利益纠缠问题，传统权重调整方法难以有效解决。通过探索频率域的固有特性，提出新的多目标优化策略，在提升细节的同时减少伪影。该研究为超分辨率模型的损失函数设计提供了理论指导。

deep_dive.title: Information-Theoretic Classifier-Free Guidance with Adaptive Schedule Optimization
deep_dive.abstract: Diffusion models have achieved strong performance in image, text-to-image, and video generation, where conditional generation is often controlled by classifier-free guidance (CFG). CFG improves condition consistency by increasing a guidance weight, but stronger guidance typically reduces diversity and distributional coverage. It remains unclear how this consistency-coverage trade-off should be controlled across the reverse trajectory, since the distribution induced by CFG is not simply the fixed-time tilted distribution given by the guided score field. To address this issue, we propose an information-theoretic framework for CFG schedule optimization. Our approach uses a clean endpoint reference to specify the desired consistency-coverage trade-off, while optimizing the actual distribution induced by the guided sampler toward this reference. We derive trajectory-level formulas to estimate the objective from samples and score evaluations, avoiding explicit density estimation. On ImageNet-512 with EDM-XXL and COCO with SD-XL, the learned schedules achieve competitive or improved trade-offs over constant guidance and allocate guidance selectively across noise levels.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: information-theoretic framework for CFG schedule optimization in diffusion models
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 扩散模型中CFG调度的信息论优化框架
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 扩散模型中CFG调度的信息论优化框架
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 扩散模型中CFG调度的信息论优化框架
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes an information-theoretic framework for optimizing classifier-free guidance schedule in diffusion models to better balance consistency and diversity.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对扩散模型中分类器自由引导的一致性与多样性权衡问题，提出信息论调度优化框架，通过干净端点参考在全轨迹上自适应调控引导权重，改善条件生成质量。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对扩散模型中分类器自由引导的一致性与多样性权衡问题，提出信息论调度优化框架，通过干净端点参考在全轨迹上自适应调控引导权重，改善条件生成质量。

deep_dive.title: TIGER: Taming Identity, Geometry, and Generative Priors for High-Quality Face Video Restoration
deep_dive.abstract: Face Video Restoration (FVR) aims to recover high-fidelity facial videos from degraded input while preserving identity and semantic consistency across frames. Existing methods often struggle to simultaneously address three key challenges: identity shift, viewpoint-entangled guidance, and perceptual realism. To tackle these issues, we propose TIGER, a structured tri-prior fusion framework that Tames Identity, Geometry, and gEnerative pRiors for high-quality FVR. Specifically, an Identity Prior is first established by injecting subject-discriminative embeddings into the latent space, effectively anchoring the subject's identity against severe degradations. Then, to provide temporally consistent structural guidance for dynamic videos, TIGER constructs a Geometry Prior by lifting 2D reference cues into a disentangled 3D parameter space, creating a geometric anchor through cross-source parameter fusion. Moreover, to achieve maximum efficiency without compromising realism, we harness the video generation model's Generative Prior through a one-step rectified flow. We further design a progressive three-stage training optimization strategy that refines structural fidelity, textural reconstruction, and distribution-level realism to ensure robust optimization. We also construct a large-scale FVR dataset to facilitate robust training and standardized evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TIGER achieves state-of-the-art performance in both identity fidelity and temporal stability, delivering a high-quality, efficient and identity-consistent FVR. Project page: https://yzhoulv.github.io/Tiger/.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: tri-prior fusion framework using identity, geometry, and generative priors for face video restoration
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 利用身份、几何和生成先验的三先验融合框架进行面部视频修复
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 利用身份、几何和生成先验的三先验融合框架进行面部视频修复
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 利用身份、几何和生成先验的三先验融合框架进行面部视频修复
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: TIGER combines identity, geometry, and generative priors in a structured fusion framework for high-quality face video restoration, addressing identity shift and perceptual realism.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: TIGER针对面部视频修复中身份偏移、视角纠缠引导和感知真实感等挑战，提出结构化三先验融合框架。通过注入身份先验、几何先验和生成先验，在保持身份一致性的同时生成逼真细节。实验表明该方法在降质面部视频修复中性能优异，为视频修复提供了新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: TIGER针对面部视频修复中身份偏移、视角纠缠引导和感知真实感等挑战，提出结构化三先验融合框架。通过注入身份先验、几何先验和生成先验，在保持身份一致性的同时生成逼真细节。实验表明该方法在降质面部视频修复中性能优异，为视频修复提供了新思路。

deep_dive.title: Focusing on What Matters: Saliency-Harnessing Accurate Routing for Diffusion MoE
deep_dive.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have emerged as a powerful paradigm for scaling diffusion models in visual generation. Recent advancements have focused on adaptively allocating computational resources across diverse tokens to improve efficiency and performance. However, we identify a routing assignment problem in existing diffusion MoE frameworks: the router fails to accurately allocate more computational resources to salient tokens. Our analysis attributes this failure to the router's reliance on noise-corrupted latent features throughout the denoising process. Such stochastic noise obscures the critical structural and textural information, thereby preventing the router from effectively distinguishing salient tokens. To address this, we propose SharpMoE, a post-training framework with a saliency-harnessing accurate routing mechanism, which utilizes clean latent features as a noise-free guidance signal for routing. By bypassing the noise-distorted inputs, SharpMoE provides the router with clear saliency guidance, enabling the identification of salient tokens even in high-noise stages. Furthermore, we introduce a trajectory routing loss to constrain the compute allocation throughout the multi-step denoising trajectory, ensuring precise resource allocation along the generation rollout. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SharpMoE serves as a versatile, plug-and-play solution that further enhances the pretrained, converged MoE models, achieving state-of-the-art performance in visual generation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Saliency-based routing for diffusion MoE to allocate compute to salient tokens
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于显著性的扩散MoE路由，为显著令牌分配更多计算
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于显著性的扩散MoE路由，为显著令牌分配更多计算
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于显著性的扩散MoE路由，为显著令牌分配更多计算
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Addresses the routing problem in diffusion MoE by proposing a saliency-harnessing router that accurately assigns resources to salient tokens, improving visual generation quality.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对扩散MoE中路由器因噪声干扰无法准确为显著令牌分配计算资源的问题，提出基于显著性感知的路由方法，通过解耦噪声与结构信息，提升视觉生成质量与效率。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对扩散MoE中路由器因噪声干扰无法准确为显著令牌分配计算资源的问题，提出基于显著性感知的路由方法，通过解耦噪声与结构信息，提升视觉生成质量与效率。

deep_dive.title: DanceOPD: On-Policy Generative Field Distillation
deep_dive.abstract: Modern image generation demands a single model that unifies diverse capabilities, including text-to-image (T2I), local editing, and global editing. However, these capabilities are rarely naturally aligned and often conflict. For instance, editing tends to degrade T2I performance, while global and local editing interfere with each other. Consequently, effectively composing these capabilities has become a central challenge for image generation model training. To tackle this, we introduce DanceOPD, an on-policy generative field distillation framework for flow-matching models that routes each sample to one capability field, queries one low-noise student-induced state, and trains with a simple velocity MSE objective. With each capability source defined as a velocity field over the shared flow state space, the student learns from fields queried on its own rollout states to compose expert capabilities. This formulation also absorbs operator-defined fields such as classifier-free guidance. Comprehensive experiments on T2I, editing, realism-field absorption, and CFG absorption show that our approach improves multi-capability composition, strengthening target capabilities while preserving anchor generation quality. We believe this work establishes a practical route for generative field distillation in flow-matching models.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: on-policy generative field distillation for flow-matching models unifying image generation and editing
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向流匹配模型的在策略生成场蒸馏，统一图像生成与编辑
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向流匹配模型的在策略生成场蒸馏，统一图像生成与编辑
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向流匹配模型的在策略生成场蒸馏，统一图像生成与编辑
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: DanceOPD is a generative field distillation framework that composes diverse image generation capabilities (T2I, local/global editing) in a single flow-matching model, resolving capability conflicts.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: DanceOPD针对图像生成模型中文本到图像生成、局部编辑和全局编辑等能力冲突问题，提出在策略生成场蒸馏框架。通过将每个样本路由至单一能力场并利用低噪声学生诱导状态进行训练，有效统一了多种能力。该方法为流匹配模型的能力组合提供了高效解决方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: DanceOPD针对图像生成模型中文本到图像生成、局部编辑和全局编辑等能力冲突问题，提出在策略生成场蒸馏框架。通过将每个样本路由至单一能力场并利用低噪声学生诱导状态进行训练，有效统一了多种能力。该方法为流匹配模型的能力组合提供了高效解决方案。

quick_skim.title: Qwen-Image-Agent: Bridging the Context Gap in Real-World Image Generation
quick_skim.abstract: While text-to-image (T2I) models have achieved remarkable progress, they struggle with real-world requests that are often underspecified, implicit, or dependent on up-to-date knowledge. We identify this challenge as the Context Gap: the mismatch between the user context and the sufficient generation context for T2I models. To bridge this gap, we propose Qwen-Image-Agent, a unified agentic framework that integrates plan, reason, search, memory and feedback in a context-centric manner. Qwen-Image-Agent treats user input as partial context and progressively constructs the generation context through Context-Aware Planning and Context Grounding. Specifically, Context-Aware Planning identifies missing context and plans how it should be acquired and used, while Context Grounding gathers this context from reason, search, memory, and feedback. To evaluate agentic image generation, we further introduce Image Agent Bench (IA-Bench), a benchmark covering four core image agent capabilities: Plan, Reason, Search, and Memory. Experiments on IA-Bench, Mindbench and WISE-Verified show that Qwen-Image-Agent outperforms strong baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Proposes an agentic framework to bridge the context gap in text-to-image generation, enhancing real-world applicability of generative models.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出智能体框架弥合文本到图像生成中的上下文差距，提升生成模型的现实适用性
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出智能体框架弥合文本到图像生成中的上下文差距，提升生成模型的现实适用性
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出智能体框架弥合文本到图像生成中的上下文差距，提升生成模型的现实适用性
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Qwen-Image-Agent addresses the context gap in real-world T2I tasks by progressively constructing generation context via planning and information retrieval, enabling more faithful and context-rich image generation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 文本到图像模型在应对包含隐式需求、时变知识的现实世界请求时面临上下文缺口。Qwen-Image-Agent通过上下文感知规划和上下文接地，将用户输入逐步建构成完整生成上下文，整合推理、搜索、记忆与反馈。实验表明，该框架能在复杂场景下生成更符合用户意图的图像，有效弥合了用户语境与模型所需生成语境之间的差距。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 文本到图像模型在应对包含隐式需求、时变知识的现实世界请求时面临上下文缺口。Qwen-Image-Agent通过上下文感知规划和上下文接地，将用户输入逐步建构成完整生成上下文，整合推理、搜索、记忆与反馈。实验表明，该框架能在复杂场景下生成更符合用户意图的图像，有效弥合了用户语境与模型所需生成语境之间的差距。

quick_skim.title: PG-MAP: Joint MAP Optimization for Inference-Time Alignment of Diffusion and Flow-Matching Models
quick_skim.abstract: Inference-time alignment of pretrained text-to-image models is typically performed along a single control axis, such as classifier-free guidance, attention editing, or reward-based latent perturbations. This limitation prevents modeling joint dependencies between conditioning and latent variables and hinders transfer across generative transports. We propose PG-MAP, a training-free framework that formulates inference-time alignment as a trajectory-level Gibbs-MAP / proximal energy optimization over the conditioning $c$ and latent state $z_t$ via a forward-consistency coupling, optionally guided by a frozen preference reward. This joint formulation enables coordinated updates across modalities while remaining compatible with both diffusion and flow-matching models through transport-specific adaptations. Across diffusion backbones (SD~1.5, SDXL), PG-MAP consistently improves alignment metrics such as PickScore and Aesthetic, and can be effectively combined with tuned classifier-free guidance to achieve the strongest overall performance. On flow-matching models (SD3.5-medium), the framework reduces to a latent-only variant, achieving $\mathbf{91.9\%}$ PickScore and $75.7\%$ HPS win rates against a static baseline, with controlled experiments ruling out noise-related artifacts. Human evaluations further confirm consistent preference over strong baselines, including tuned CFG and compute-matched universal guidance. Finally, an oracle-routing analysis shows that the relative importance of conditioning and latent optimization depends on prompt types, surfacing further headroom that a per-prompt selector could exploit.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Joint MAP optimization for inference-time alignment of diffusion models
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 扩散模型推理时对齐的联合MAP优化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 扩散模型推理时对齐的联合MAP优化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 扩散模型推理时对齐的联合MAP优化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes PG-MAP, a training-free framework for joint energy optimization over conditioning and latent states to align diffusion and flow-matching models, enabling coordinated cross-modal updates.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有文本到图像扩散模型的推理时对齐通常沿单一控制轴进行，难以建模条件变量与隐变量间的联合依赖。本文提出PG-MAP，一种免训练的框架，将对齐形式化为轨迹级Gibbs-MAP/近端能量优化，通过前向一致性耦合对条件和隐状态进行联合更新，可协调跨模态更新并与多种扩散和流匹配主干兼容，为更灵活的生成控制提供了基础。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有文本到图像扩散模型的推理时对齐通常沿单一控制轴进行，难以建模条件变量与隐变量间的联合依赖。本文提出PG-MAP，一种免训练的框架，将对齐形式化为轨迹级Gibbs-MAP/近端能量优化，通过前向一致性耦合对条件和隐状态进行联合更新，可协调跨模态更新并与多种扩散和流匹配主干兼容，为更灵活的生成控制提供了基础。

quick_skim.title: Adversarial Domain Prompt Tuning and Generation for Single Domain Generalization
quick_skim.abstract: Single domain generalization (SDG) aims to learn a robust model, which could perform well on many unseen domains while there is only one single domain available for training. One of the promising directions for achieving single-domain generalization is to generate out-of-domain (OOD) training data through data augmentation or image generation. Given the rapid advancements in AI-generated content (AIGC), this paper is the first to propose leveraging powerful pre-trained text-to-image (T2I) foundation models to create the training data. However, manually designing textual prompts to generate images for all possible domains is often impractical, and some domain characteristics may be too abstract to describe with words. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Progressive Adversarial Prompt Tuning (PAPT) framework for pre-trained diffusion models. Instead of relying on static textual domains, our approach learns two sets of abstract prompts as conditions for the diffusion model: one that captures domain-invariant category information and another that models domain-specific styles. This adversarial learning mechanism enables the T2I model to generate images in various domain styles while preserving key categorical features. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, achieving superior performances to state-of-the-art single-domain generalization approaches.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Leverages pre-trained text-to-image models for out-of-domain data generation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用预训练文本到图像模型生成域外数据
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用预训练文本到图像模型生成域外数据
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用预训练文本到图像模型生成域外数据
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a method for single domain generalization by adversarially tuning prompts and generating diverse training images with a pre-trained text-to-image model.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 首次提出利用预训练文本到图像基础模型生成域外训练数据，以解决单域泛化问题，通过对抗性提示调优与生成，克服手动设计提示的困难，提高了模型在未知域的泛化能力。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 首次提出利用预训练文本到图像基础模型生成域外训练数据，以解决单域泛化问题，通过对抗性提示调优与生成，克服手动设计提示的困难，提高了模型在未知域的泛化能力。

quick_skim.title: PortraitGen: Exemplar-Driven GRPO with Dual-Reward Guidance for Photorealistic Portrait Generation
quick_skim.abstract: Reinforcement Learning like Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has significantly advanced text-to-image post-training. However, current methods often favor superficial aesthetics, such as over-saturated colors, leaving critical flaws like AI artifacts and biological implausibilities unresolved. We attribute these limitations to two primary factors: (1) The absence of real images during post-training confines GRPO sampling to the original distribution, failing to break inherent generative boundaries; (2) the optimization process lacks specific rewards targeting fine-grained artifacts like overly oily skin and other AI artifacts. To address this, we propose PortraitGen, a novel framework tailored for photorealistic portrait generation. First, we break inherent generative boundaries by directly introducing real images into the GRPO sampling groups, where image inversion is employed to obtain their transition probabilities and latents. Second, to explicitly steer the model toward photorealism, we introduce a complementary dual-reward mechanism: OmniReward for general quality and AI-Portrait for human-centric fidelity. Furthermore, we curate PortraitBench, a comprehensive portrait-centric benchmark. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PortraitGen significantly outperforms existing baselines, effectively suppressing AI artifacts and achieving unprecedented photorealism.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Portrait generation using GRPO with dual-reward to reduce AI artifacts
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用GRPO和双奖励引导的真实感人像生成，减少AI伪影
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用GRPO和双奖励引导的真实感人像生成，减少AI伪影
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用GRPO和双奖励引导的真实感人像生成，减少AI伪影
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes PortraitGen, which uses exemplar-driven GRPO and dual-reward guidance to produce photorealistic portraits, addressing issues like oily skin and biological implausibilities.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有文本到图像后训练方法偏好表面美学而忽略真实感与生物学合理性（如皮肤油腻、AI伪影）的问题，提出PortraitGen框架，结合示例驱动的GRPO与双奖励引导，显著提升人像生成的真实度。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有文本到图像后训练方法偏好表面美学而忽略真实感与生物学合理性（如皮肤油腻、AI伪影）的问题，提出PortraitGen框架，结合示例驱动的GRPO与双奖励引导，显著提升人像生成的真实度。

quick_skim.title: Scaling Multi-Reference Image Generation with Dynamic Reward Optimization
quick_skim.abstract: While personalized image generation has achieved remarkable progress, multi-reference image generation (MRIG) remains a challenging task. Most existing benchmarks fail to adequately evaluate complex MRIG scenarios, hindering further progress in this area. To better assess model performance on complex MRIG tasks, we introduce OmniRef-Bench, a benchmark that covers complex combinations of reference image types and a large number of reference images. Evaluations on OmniRef-Bench show that mainstream open-source models struggle in complex MRIG scenarios, and their performance deteriorates significantly as the number of mixed-type reference images increases. To address this issue, we propose DyRef, a two-stage training framework. In the first stage, supervised fine-tuning equips the model with the basic capability to handle complex MRIG tasks. In the second stage, we introduce Difficulty-aware Advantage Reweighting (DAR) and Discriminative Reward Scaling (DRS). DAR dynamically adjusts the optimization objective to improve performance when handling a large number of mixed-type reference images. DRS enlarges intra-group reward differences for more effective policy optimization. Experiments demonstrate that DyRef significantly improves the performance of open-source models on OmniRef-Bench and single-image editing benchmarks, demonstrating the effectiveness and generalization capability of our approach.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: multi-reference image generation benchmark and two-stage training with dynamic reward optimization
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出多参考图像生成基准和动态奖励优化的两阶段训练框架
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出多参考图像生成基准和动态奖励优化的两阶段训练框架
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出多参考图像生成基准和动态奖励优化的两阶段训练框架
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces OmniRef-Bench and DyRef, a framework with dynamic reward optimization that improves multi-reference image generation as complexity increases.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多参考图像生成任务中现有基准不足和模型在复杂场景下性能退化的问题，本文提出OmniRef-Bench基准和DyRef两阶段训练框架。第一阶段进行监督预训练，第二阶段采用动态奖励优化提升参考一致性。实验表明，随着混合类型参考图像数量增加，DyRef仍能保持稳定生成质量，为个性化图像生成提供了有效方案。该方法通过奖励机制动态调整训练目标，缓解了多参考冲突，在多个评估指标上超越现有开源模型。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对多参考图像生成任务中现有基准不足和模型在复杂场景下性能退化的问题，本文提出OmniRef-Bench基准和DyRef两阶段训练框架。第一阶段进行监督预训练，第二阶段采用动态奖励优化提升参考一致性。实验表明，随着混合类型参考图像数量增加，DyRef仍能保持稳定生成质量，为个性化图像生成提供了有效方案。该方法通过奖励机制动态调整训练目标，缓解了多参考冲突，在多个评估指标上超越现有开源模型。

quick_skim.title: Don't Settle at the Mode! Mitigating Diversity Collapse in Pretrained Flow Models via Feature Self-Guidance
quick_skim.abstract: State-of-the-art flow models generate stunning images from text or image prompts. However, they suffer from diversity collapse when generating multiple samples under the same conditioning. Existing methods address this issue via either latent guidance, which has limited effectiveness, or sample selection, which relies on external reward models that incur significant inference-time overhead. In this work, we introduce an efficient, training-free self-guidance mechanism to mitigate diversity collapse without requiring additional reward models. Specifically, we disperse the internal features of the flow model during batch generation with feature self-guidance. Further, to keep the features close to the manifold, we introduce a manifold regularization step that projects these dispersed features back onto the data manifold, ensuring diverse generation without sacrificing alignment with the input conditions. Our method integrates seamlessly as a plug-and-play module into pretrained flow models, adding only a marginal inference cost. Experiments demonstrate significant improvements in diversity while preserving fidelity across several conditional flow models, including multi-step and few-step text-to-image, depth-to-image, and reference image generation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Feature self-guidance to mitigate diversity collapse in flow models
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 特征自引导缓解流模型多样性坍缩
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 特征自引导缓解流模型多样性坍缩
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 特征自引导缓解流模型多样性坍缩
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces a training-free feature self-guidance mechanism to mitigate diversity collapse in pretrained flow models by dispersing internal features, improving sample diversity without extra overhead.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 预训练流模型在相同条件生成多样本时易出现多样性坍缩。现有方法或效果有限，或需外部奖励模型引入高计算开销。本文提出一种无需额外模型的高效训练无关自引导机制，通过在批次生成中扩散模型内部特征并用特征自引导来增加多样性，同时保持特征靠近流形。该方法有效缓解了多样性坍缩问题，且几乎不增加推理时间。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 预训练流模型在相同条件生成多样本时易出现多样性坍缩。现有方法或效果有限，或需外部奖励模型引入高计算开销。本文提出一种无需额外模型的高效训练无关自引导机制，通过在批次生成中扩散模型内部特征并用特征自引导来增加多样性，同时保持特征靠近流形。该方法有效缓解了多样性坍缩问题，且几乎不增加推理时间。
